message:
feat(beads): add in-process beadsdk.Storage integration (GH#3185)

Add optional in-process beadsdk.Storage to Beads and Mailbox structs,
bypassing bd CLI subprocess overhead (~600ms per operation). Opt-in via
SetStore(), falls back to subprocess when nil. Architecture matches
convoy_manager.go pattern.

Fix-merge of PR #3185 with corrections:
- Propagate errors from label add/remove and parent-link creation
  instead of swallowing them
- Document ForceCloseWithReason store path bypasses dependency validation
- Initialize DependsOn slice before append loop in sdkIssueToIssue
- Eliminate double-query for hooked status in mail storeListFromDir
- Add 32 unit tests covering List/Show/Create/Close/Ready/Update
  happy paths, error cases, label operations, and dependency management

Co-Authored-By: Daniel Jasiński <daniel.jasinski@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
